heading: Retro Games, Mobile Apps & Software Development
intro: BarkinMad Studios is an independent UK software and game development studio creating retro-inspired arcade games, [mobile apps](/services/mobile-app-development), business tools, prototypes, and digital solutions for iPhone, iPad, and the web.

hero.alt: Retro arcade gaming and software development workspace at BarkinMad Studios

sections.title: Retro Arcade Games
sections.description: Discover the growing [ZX Series](/zx-series), a connected collection of retro-inspired arcade games featuring achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, multiplayer modes, and shared progression systems.

sections.title: Mobile Apps
sections.description: Browse BarkinMad Studios [apps](/apps), including retro arcade games, productivity tools, score tracking applications, and future software projects designed for iPhone and iPad.

sections.title: Software Development Services
sections.description: BarkinMad Studios also provides [custom software development](/services/custom-software-development), [mobile app development](/services/mobile-app-development), [internal business tools](/services/internal-business-tools), workflow automation, websites, and prototype development services.

sections.title: About BarkinMad Studios
sections.description: Learn more about the studio, its background, development approach, public projects, and long-term vision for creating games, applications, and software solutions.
